title: athyrium pariens
intro: Athyrium pariens, also known as the Lady Fern or Lady-fern, is a species of fern native to Asia. Traditionally used in medicine, it has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Athyrium pariens include its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
